channel.title: Json on Arrans github.io
channel.description: Recent content in Json on Arrans github.io

item.title: opendataloader-project/opendataloader-pdf
item.description: PDF Parser for AI-ready data. Automate PDF accessibility. Open-source.

item.title: mikefarah/yq
item.description: yq is a portable command-line YAML, JSON, XML, CSV, TOML, HCL and properties processor

item.title: AykutSarac/jsoncrack.com
item.description: ✨ Innovative and open-source visualization application that transforms various data formats, such as JSON, YAML, XML and CSV into interactive graphs.

item.title: johnkerl/miller
item.description: Miller is like awk, sed, cut, join, and sort for name-indexed data such as CSV, TSV, and tabular JSON

item.title: saulpw/visidata
item.description: A terminal spreadsheet multitool for discovering and arranging data

item.title: nao1215/sqly
item.description: executes SQL against CSV, TSV, LTSV, JSON, JSONL, Parquet, Microsoft Excel™ , ACH, and Fedwire files with shell.

item.title: nao1215/filesql
item.description: sql driver for CSV, TSV, LTSV, JSON, Parquet, Excel with gzip, bzip2, xz, zstd support.
